covered_sentences: Is Heathcliff dead, then? I asked, amazed.
But come in, and I'll tell you all about it.
I entered and sat by the fire opposite Mrs. Dean, and she told me the end of Heathcliff's story.
I will retell it here in her own words.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split, 2:1 ratio (narrator's shock reaction is the emotional pivot, takes main panel). Left panel: camera at mid-shot from inside the sitting room, angled toward the narrator who stands in the doorway with a look of genuine astonishment — eyebrows raised, eyes wide, body slightly leaning back. Right panel: camera shifts to Nelly Dean seated by the fire at three-quarter angle, calm and composed, gesturing with one hand to invite the narrator inside; the fire glows warmly beside her.

Left panel: narrator raises both hands slightly at chest height in a gesture of surprise; speech bubble above him contains a gravestone outline + large question mark icon. Right panel: Nelly Dean extends one hand open-palm toward the narrator, gesturing inward; her other hand rests on her knee; she has a calm storytelling posture, no speech bubble needed as the gesture conveys the invitation.

Left panel: Wuthering Heights sitting room, daytime; narrator stands in the doorway, doorframe stone edge visible at foreground left and right. Right panel: same room interior; Nelly seated on a wooden chair beside the fireplace, iron grate and fire glow visible to her right; the stone floor and faint wall detail in background.

Left panel: cooler daylight from the door opening illuminates the narrator's face from behind. Right panel: warm amber firelight on Nelly and surrounding area, cool stone-grey ambient beyond.

Left panel: narrator (Lockwood) — light/brown short hair, dark coat and trousers; stands in the doorway, head approximately at the height of the upper door stone lintel, eyes wide with amazement. Right panel: Nelly Dean — deep brown hair pinned up, round face calm, dark domestic dress with white apron; seated, head height roughly level with the top of the fireplace mantle.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Angular external appearance, costume details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or altered details; character proportions consistent throughout. Multi-panel dividing line: thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap; no outer border. Scene fingerprint: large stone fireplace + stone doorway frame + stone-flagged floor, positions unchanged. Narrator: hair color must not change, dark coat must not be replaced, no beard. Nelly: dark brown hair pinned up must not change, white apron must not be removed. No floating text or narration captions; speech bubble uses icon sketches only (gravestone + question mark), no written English. 【情绪标记】强度：中，类型：惊讶，推荐视觉手段：夸张眉梢上扬 + 双手微举 + B级符号图标（深蓝色大问号）。已扫描4对相邻句，四维度均无切换（同一场景，同一话题——确认死讯并进入叙述，同一情绪基调的轻微转变属于连续推进），豁免保留。

covered_sentences: I was summoned to Wuthering Heights a few months after you left us.
Mr. Heathcliff said he was tired of seeing Catherine.
I should make the kitchen my sitting room, he said, and keep Catherine with me there.
I did as I was told, and Hareton spent his evenings with us in the kitchen.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split, 1:1. Left panel: mid-shot from inside the kitchen at three-quarter angle; Heathcliff stands at the kitchen doorway, posture commanding, pointing or gesturing toward the kitchen interior as he issues instructions; Nelly Dean stands facing him, slightly deferential, listening. Right panel: kitchen evening scene — Nelly seated on a stool near the worktable, Catherine (young woman, slightly disheveled appearance, dark dress) sitting across the table or on a bench; warm lamp or firelight; implied that Hareton is present at the edge of the frame (not identifiable as character_refs here — shown as a broad-shouldered shape at the far edge).

Left panel: Heathcliff points toward the kitchen with one hand, his other hand at his side; posture upright and dismissive; no speech bubble — his commanding gesture conveys the order. Nelly inclines her head slightly in compliance. Right panel: Nelly and Catherine seated in the kitchen; Nelly holds needlework or keeps hands at rest on the table; Catherine sits with a subdued expression, arms folded or hands in her lap; warm lamplight between them; Hareton's broad silhouette visible at far right edge of panel, not identifiable.

Left panel: Wuthering Heights kitchen, daytime/early evening transition; kitchen doorway at left, thick wooden worktable visible in background, stone-flagged floor. Right panel: kitchen interior, evening — oil lamp or candle on the worktable provides the main light; iron stove with copper pots at left wall, wooden stool and bench around the table center.

Left panel: cool neutral light from the corridor behind Heathcliff, slight warm spill from the kitchen ahead. Right panel: warm amber lamplight on the seated figures, cool shadows at the room perimeter.

Left panel: Heathcliff — dark-skinned adult male, black slightly disheveled hair, black sharp eyes, tall sturdy build, dark gentleman's coat, white shirt, dark trousers, leather boots; standing in the doorway, his head approximately 10 cm above the door frame upper edge (he is taller than a standard door). Nelly Dean beside him — dark brown hair pinned up, white apron, dark dress; her head at roughly his shoulder height. Right panel: Nelly — as above, seated, head height approximately level with the worktable overhead lamp. Catherine (凯西变体C6b) — dark eyes, golden curly hair slightly disheveled, pale complexion, plain dark dress; seated, her head roughly at Nelly's shoulder height when both are seated.

covered_sentences: I noticed that the young people were fond of each other now.
Catherine told me how they had become friends.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Single panel, path/S-curve composition. Camera positioned inside the kitchen at a low 15° angle, looking across the kitchen space; in the mid-ground, Catherine (young woman) leans forward over the worktable toward Nelly Dean who sits on the far side listening; their heads are angled toward each other in quiet conversation. The thick worktable runs diagonally from lower-right to upper-left, forming a natural compositional path between the two figures. Warm kitchen lamplight on both faces.

Catherine leans on the table with both forearms, face animated and earnest as she speaks; Nelly rests her hands on the table and listens with a warm, attentive expression. No speech bubbles — the body language of intimate conversation carries the scene.

Wuthering Heights kitchen, daytime interior, warm ambient light from the window above the stove and soft lamp on the table; iron stove and copper pots at left wall; the thick worktable between the two figures.

Warm amber-yellow ambient kitchen light; soft highlights on both faces, cool stone-grey shadow in the background.

covered_sentences: After Linton Heathcliff's death, Catherine had spent most of her time in her room, but there was no fire there, and one day she told Zillah that she couldn't stand the cold anymore.
Zillah told her to come downstairs to the sitting room.
Since Mr. Heathcliff was out, she came down and sat by the fire with Zillah and Hareton.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split, 1:1. Left panel: camera inside the bleak upstairs bedroom at three-quarter angle from the doorway corner; Catherine sits hunched on the simple wooden bed, arms wrapped around herself, posture showing cold and misery; the narrow stone-framed window above lets in only a sliver of grey light; Zillah stands in the doorway, body angled toward Catherine, gesturing downward with one hand toward the stairs. Right panel: camera at mid-shot inside the Wuthering Heights sitting room, warm firelight scene; Catherine and Zillah have descended — Catherine now seated on a wooden chair close to the fireplace, leaning toward the warmth, posture relieved; Zillah stands a step behind. (Hareton implied as present at edge but not identifiable.)

Left panel: Catherine hugs herself, shoulders rounded, face drawn with cold and grief; Zillah at the doorway points one hand firmly downward, the other on the doorframe. Right panel: Catherine leans forward with both hands extended slightly toward the fireplace grate; Zillah stands behind her in a supervisory posture, arms loosely folded. No speech bubbles.

Left panel: Wuthering Heights upper prison bedroom, grey daytime light through the single narrow stone window; bare wooden floor, simple wooden bed in center, wooden chair against the wall; door in the right foreground with the hallway beyond. Right panel: Wuthering Heights sitting room, daytime warm light; large stone fireplace with fire burning, iron grate visible; stone-flagged floor, wooden chair near the hearth.

Left panel: cold grey light, blue-grey ambient, stark shadows on bare stone walls. Right panel: warm amber firelight contrast against cool stone walls — transition from cold to warm mirrors Catherine's emotional shift.

Left panel: Catherine (C6b) — dark eyes, golden curly hair slightly disheveled, pale complexion, plain dark dress; seated on the bed edge, her head at approximately one-third of the room's total height. Zillah — tall sturdy build, dark hair neat or slightly loose, dark household dress with white apron; standing in the doorway, her head approximately level with the top of the door frame (she is slightly taller than a standard woman). Right panel: Catherine in front of the fireplace, seated, head at roughly the fireplace mantle lower edge; Zillah behind her, standing, head approximately at mantle level.
